name: session-insights
description: Per-session work metrics for Claude Code: PostToolUse + Stop hooks roll up tool calls, turns, files touched, a size class (XS–XL) and a work category per session, viewable with `session-insights report` and optionally logged as a dated note to an Obsidian vault. v0.2: cross-session backlog (session-insights backlog add/resolve/render/brief) — /record step 5 auto-registers 残課題 and resolves completed items into a global backlog.md in the Obsidian vault, surfaced at SessionStart. Subscription-native (two hooks + bundled Rust binary, no API key).
